title: Wrkstrm Finance Exit Whisper
purpose: Own the reusable wrkstrm-finance mandate for exit guidance, profit capture rules, trailing stop strategies, simulations, and human-in-the-loop exit governance.

responsibilities: Use strategy risk and drift signals as context for exit recommendations.
Send realized P/L and exit context back into entity-aware journal records.
Route broker hooks, orders, and overrides through approved adapter boundaries.

objectives: Separate exit advisory logic from Tau's core agenda and from trade journal ownership.
Keep exit recommendations simulation-backed, sleeve-aware, and governed by human override rules.
Make duplicated source milestones visible while consolidating the role mandate.
responsibilities: Define profit capture and trailing stop strategies for supported strategy types.
Maintain simulation and replay expectations for exit rules.
Record exit P/L context through the Trade Journaler role.
Keep autonomous exit machinery behind human-in-the-loop governance until explicitly approved.
guardrails: Planned exit work is not evidence that any exit action was taken.
Exit recommendations are advisory unless a governed order, override, or broker receipt records execution.
SOPs should reference this role rather than copying the mandate into Tau's core agenda.

text: Migrated from Tau's agenda because exit guidance is a wrkstrm-finance role mandate. Duplicate source milestones were consolidated into role work items where the same title appeared with and without a due date.

sections.title: Mandate
items: Own strategy-aware exit guidance and simulation-backed recommendations.
Keep broker hooks and autonomous behavior gated by explicit governance.
Return realized P/L and exit context to the journal without owning the journal role.
